title: To Sprinkle or Not To Sprinkle
content: What do you consider to be the classic donut? Sprinkled or glazed? Does a simple glaze cut it? There's hundreds and thousands of options to consider.

title: Pancakes or Waffles: The Never Ending Debate
content: Why do we feel the need to pit them against one another? Why can't pancakes and waffles live in harmony?

title: Creamy Potato Soup
content:
the best soup you'll ever have. Listen. you'll need taters, carrots, spinch, some kale if you're feeling cheeky. that's the healthy shit. Now some chicken. Breast, thigh, doesn't matter. finally, heavy cream and milk. cut that vegan bullshit, we want a lactose intolerants worst nightmare.
First, cut allat shit up. Taters and carrots, all chunked, into boiling water. Let em cook while you prep the chicken. Season that thang, parsley sage rosemary and thyme. oregano, mixed herbs. paprika. whatever you bloody want. want it sweet? slap some honey on that bitch.
slap that shit in some foil with some butter knobs (HAH, knobs) and oven cook that until it's not gonna kill you. 
When your taters and carrots are ready, drain em and put em in the blender. Don't have one? get yourself a masher and do it by hand. Mash those to oblivion and add the cream. it's gonna be so creamy you're gonna cry. add some butter if yiu want. 
Now, add more seasoning. same as the chicken, different if you want. If the soup is too thick, add some stock. Chicken to match the meat, but you can mix it up to be fruity if you want. it's all up to you. 
Once your chicken is done, dice those breasts or thighs and spread em through the soup. Cook it a bit longer, but remember it will thicken up when you let it cool. Add the green shit, kale, spinch, whatever you want. This is going to be your entire day, all five of them. Simmer that fucker. Low heat, lid on. Tender style. 

Now it's done. Baboom vavoom. Never say I don't treat you. Pro tip: add whatever shit you want into that soup. Want beef, not chicken. Fuckin, whatever. Just make sure it's cooked. Make a shitton and stick the leftovers in freezer tubs. Keeps forever. Thaw in the fridge overnight and tip into a pan to reheat. 
Godspeed, you glorious gay bitches
